1st.name: 1st
1st.label: Most common
1st.description: Highlights the most common category in each region

Top.name: Top
Top.label: Most common
Top.description: Highlights the most common category in each region

2nd.name: 2nd
2nd.label: 2nd most common
2nd.description: Highlights the 2nd most common category in each region

3rd.name: 3rd
3rd.label: 3rd most common
3rd.description: Highlights the 3rd most common category in each region

Bottom.name: Bottom
Bottom.label: Least common
Bottom.description: Highlights the least common category in each region

1stPct.name: 1stPct
1stPct.label: Most common share
1stPct.description: Shows the percentage share of the most common category in each region

2ndPct.name: 2ndPct
2ndPct.label: 2nd most common share
2ndPct.description: Shows the percentage share of the 2nd most common category in each region

3rdPct.name: 3rdPct
3rdPct.label: 3rd most common share
3rdPct.description: Shows the percentage share of the 3rd most common category in each region

Change.name: Change
Change.label: Change
Change.description: Shows the change in the selected metric between two time periods. Requires an interval (two years) in the When field.

Top3.name: Top3
Top3.label: Top 3 fields
Top3.description: Colors each region based on its top 3 categories combined, assigning a unique color to each unique combination

Diversity.name: Diversity
Diversity.label: Diversity
Diversity.description: Shows the Religious Diversity Index (RDI) for each region, measuring how evenly distributed the categories are

DiversityPew.name: DiversityPew
DiversityPew.label: Pew diversity
DiversityPew.description: Shows the Pew-adjusted Religious Diversity Index for each region, using grouped categories similar to Pew Research methodology
